import os code = ''' import os import json from datetime import datetime from pathlib import Path class ReportGenerator: """مولد تقارير HTML احترافي لنتائج التحليل""" VERSION = "1.0.0" def __init__(self, output_dir=None): self.output_dir = Path(output_dir) if output_dir else Path("reports") self.output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) def generate_html_report(self, analysis_results, project_name="Unknown", screenshots=None): """توليد تقرير HTML شامل من نتائج التحليل Args: analysis_results: dict من نتائج CodeAnalyzer project_name: اسم المشروع screenshots: قائمة مسارات لقطات الشاشة (اختياري) Returns: str: مسار ملف التقرير """ ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S") filename = f"report_{project_name}_{ts}.html" filepath = self.output_dir / filename summary = analysis_results.get("summary", {}) files = analysis_results.get("files_analyzed", []) issues = analysis_results.get("all_issues", []) total_files = summary.get("total_files", 0) total_issues = summary.get("total_issues", 0) critical = sum(1 for i in issues if i.get("severity") == "CRITICAL") high = sum(1 for i in issues if i.get("severity") == "HIGH") medium = sum(1 for i in issues if i.get("severity") == "MEDIUM") low = sum(1 for i in issues if i.get("severity") == "LOW") info = sum(1 for i in issues if i.get("severity") == "INFO") html = f""" تقرير تحليل: {project_name}

\U0001f50d تقرير تحليل الكود

المشروع: {project_name} | التاريخ: {datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")}

CodeAnalyzer v1.0.0 | ReportGenerator v{self.VERSION}

{total_files}

ملف تم فحصه

{critical}

حرج

{high}

عالي

{medium}

متوسط

{low}

منخفض

{info}

معلومات

""" if issues: html += """\n

\U0001f6a8 المشاكل المكتشفة

""" for idx, issue in enumerate(issues, 1): sev = issue.get("severity", "INFO") badge_class = f"badge-{sev.lower()}" html += f"""\n""" if issue.get("suggestion"): html += f"""\n""" html += "\n
#الملفالسطرالخطورةالنوعالوصف
{idx} {issue.get("file", "N/A")} {issue.get("line", "-")} {sev} {issue.get("type", "N/A")} {issue.get("message", "N/A")}
\U0001f4a1 {issue["suggestion"]}
\n
" else: html += """\n

\u2705 لا توجد مشاكل!

الكود نظيف ولم يتم العثور على مشاكل.

""" if files: html += """\n

\U0001f4c1 الملفات المفحوصة

""" for idx, f in enumerate(files, 1): html += f"""\n""" html += "\n
#الملفالحجمالمشاكل
{idx}{f.get("path", "N/A")}{f.get("size", "N/A")}{f.get("issues_count", 0)}
\n
" html += f"""\n

\U0001f916 تم التوليد بواسطة CodeAnalyzer ReportGenerator v{self.VERSION}

{datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}

\n
\n\n""" with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: f.write(html) return { "success": True, "filepath": str(filepath), "filename": filename, "size_bytes": os.path.getsize(filepath), "total_issues": total_issues, "timestamp": datetime.now().isoformat() } def generate_json_report(self, analysis_results, project_name="Unknown"): """توليد تقرير JSON""" ts = datetime.now().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S") filename = f"report_{project_name}_{ts}.json" filepath = self.output_dir / filename report = { "generator": f"ReportGenerator v{self.VERSION}", "project": project_name, "generated_at": datetime.now().isoformat(), "results": analysis_results } with open(filepath, "w", encoding="utf-8") as f: json.dump(report, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) return { "success": True, "filepath": str(filepath), "size_bytes": os.path.getsize(filepath) } def generate_summary_text(self, analysis_results, project_name="Unknown"): """توليد ملخص نصي مختصر""" summary = analysis_results.get("summary", {}) issues = analysis_results.get("all_issues", []) lines = [ f"=== تقرير تحليل: {project_name} ===", f"التاريخ: {datetime.now().strftime(chr(37)+\'Y-\'+chr(37)+\'m-\'+chr(37)+\'d \'+chr(37)+\'H:\'+chr(37)+\'M\')}", f"الملفات: {summary.get(\'total_files\', 0)}", f"المشاكل: {summary.get(\'total_issues\', 0)}", "", ] for issue in issues[:20]: sev = issue.get("severity", "?") msg = issue.get("message", "") fl = issue.get("file", "") ln = issue.get("line", "-") lines.append(f"[{sev}] {fl}:{ln} - {msg}") if len(issues) > 20: lines.append(f"... و {len(issues) - 20} مشكلة إضافية") return "\n".join(lines) if __name__ == "__main__": gen = ReportGenerator() sample = { "summary": {"total_files": 5, "total_issues": 3}, "all_issues": [ {"file": "test.py", "line": 10, "severity": "HIGH", "type": "security", "message": "eval() usage", "suggestion": "Use ast.literal_eval()"} ], "files_analyzed": [{"path": "test.py", "size": "1.2 KB", "issues_count": 1}] } result = gen.generate_html_report(sample, "TestProject") print(f"Report: {result}") ''' file_path = r'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer\report_generator.py' with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(code.strip()) print(f'FILE_CREATED: {file_path}') print(f'SIZE: {os.path.getsize(file_path)} bytes') print('REPORT_GENERATOR_OK')
description: إنشاء ملف report_generator.py — مولد تقارير HTML احترافي
